/usr/bin/ar qc libengine.a CMakeFiles/engine.dir/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/ai/AI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/animation/Animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/audio/Audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/ecs/ECS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/networking/Network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/physics/Physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/platform/Platform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/renderer/VulkanDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/world/World.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libengine.a
